_meta.source: SEC 8-K, Quiver Quantitative, Investing.com, web search
_meta.note: JUST REPORTED — May 26, 2026 (yesterday). Most recent data available. Revenue miss vs beat on EPS — analytically interesting.

fy27_preliminary_guidance.note: FY27 preliminary guidance implies deceleration — management guiding conservatively or growth genuinely slowing?

red_canary_acquisition_note: Red Canary acquisition contributed to ARR. Organic ARR growth ~21% (vs reported 25%). Strip-out important for clean comparison.
platform_narrative: ZS is the zero-trust pure-play. RPO +30% YoY ($6.5B) shows multi-year visibility. Revenue MISS vs consensus (-$10M, -1.2%) is the outlier — first miss in several quarters. EPS beat (+$0.04) from margin discipline. Organic ARR growth 21% (ex-Red Canary) vs reported 25% — acquisition flatters the headline. FY27 guidance decel (16-17%) is the market's concern. REPORTED YESTERDAY — fresh read.
